name: Giant Rat
tips: Giant Rat is the Rat deck's resilience engine. As long as you have any Rat on the board, killing Giant Rat just creates another one at full stats.
Pair with Ratchanter's conjured Common Rats — they serve as both board presence and promote fodder when Giant Rat dies.
Position a Common Rat in your back row as insurance. If Giant Rat dies on the front line, the back-row Rat promotes into a fresh 30/30 without losing tempo.
To The Ratmobile! tutoring 2 Rats helps ensure you always have promote targets available when Giant Rat falls.
Be aware that Unique prevents you from playing a second Giant Rat while one is alive. If your Giant Rat is damaged, you cannot play a fresh copy — you must wait for it to die and promote.
rulings: Unique means only one Giant Rat can be on the board at a time. You cannot play a second copy while one is already in play.
When Giant Rat dies, its death effect promotes any Rat you control into a new Giant Rat. The promoted Rat is replaced in-place on the board.
If no friendly Rats are on the board when Giant Rat dies, the promote effect fizzles and nothing happens.
The promoted Rat becomes a fresh Giant Rat at full stats (30🗡️/30🤍), regardless of the original Rat's stats or damage.
